about.title: About Blito
about.bio: The street artist known as Blito has 10 years of trajectory in the cultural sector and is part of the Sabor Latino Crew collective. He currently leads the 'Ilegales' project in the Olivos neighborhood of Soacha, a space dedicated to pedagogy, artistic supplies delivery, and creating murals of hope.
